option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# EasyWinPackages - Turkish messages app.title=EasyWinPackages
# Navigation nav.dashboard=Ana Ekran nav.search=Arama & Kurulum nav.updates=G\u00FCncellemeler nav.uninstall=Kald\u0131r nav.bundle=Paket Demeti nav.sources=Kaynaklar nav.settings=Ayarlar
# Dashboard dashboard.title=Ana Ekran dashboard.subtitle=Kurulu paketlerinize ve g\u00FCncellemelere genel bak\u0131\u015F dashboard.winget.installed=Winget Kurulu dashboard.choco.installed=Choco Kurulu dashboard.scoop.installed=Scoop Kurulu dashboard.pending.updates=Bekleyen G\u00FCncellemeler dashboard.total.installed=Toplam Kurulu dashboard.available.sources=Aktif Kaynaklar dashboard.loading=Y\u00FCkleniyor... dashboard.unavailable=Mevcut De\u011Fil dashboard.refresh=Yenile dashboard.source.winget=Windows Paket Y\u00F6neticisi dashboard.source.choco=Chocolatey dashboard.source.scoop=Scoop dashboard.updates.sub=T\u00FCm kaynaklarda dashboard.quick.actions=H\u0131zl\u0131 \u0130\u015Flemler dashboard.sources.status=Paket Y\u00F6neticisi Durumu dashboard.action.search=\uD83D\uDD0D Arama & Kurulum dashboard.action.updates=\uD83D\uDD04 G\u00FCncelleme Kontrol dashboard.action.sources=\u2699\uFE0F Kaynaklar\u0131 Y\u00F6net dashboard.install.prompt.title=Paket Y\u00F6neticisi Kur dashboard.install.prompt.msg={0} kurmak ister misiniz? dashboard.status.installed.hint=Kurulu \u2014 y\u00F6netmek i\u00E7in t\u0131klay\u0131n dashboard.status.not.installed.hint=Kurulu de\u011Fil \u2014 kurmak i\u00E7in t\u0131klay\u0131n
# Search search.title=Arama & Kurulum search.subtitle=Winget, Chocolatey veya Scoop \u00FCzerinden paket aray\u0131n ve kurun search.source=Kaynak search.source.all=T\u00FCm Kaynaklar search.source.unavailable.revert={0} kurulu de\u011Fil. \u00D6nceki se\u00E7ime geri d\u00F6n\u00FCld\u00FC. search.placeholder=Paket ad\u0131 veya ID girin... search.button=Ara search.col.id=Paket ID search.col.name=Ad search.col.version=S\u00FCr\u00FCm search.col.source=Kaynak search.col.bundle=Demet search.install=Kur search.add.bundle=+ Demete Ekle search.installing=Kuruluyor... search.no.results=Sonu\u00E7 bulunamad\u0131. Farkl\u0131 bir sorgu deneyin. search.added.bundle.title=Demete Eklendi search.added.bundle.msg={0} demete eklendi. search.source.unavailable.title=Kaynak Mevcut De\u011Fil search.source.unavailable.msg={0} bu sistemde kurulu de\u011Fil. search.source.go=Kaynaklara Git
# Updates updates.title=G\u00FCncellemeler updates.subtitle=T\u00FCm kaynaklarda g\u00FCncelleme bekleyen paketler updates.col.name=Ad updates.col.current=Mevcut updates.col.new=Mevcut G\u00FCncelleme updates.col.source=Kaynak updates.update.selected=Se\u00E7iliyi G\u00FCncelle updates.update.all=Hepsini G\u00FCncelle updates.update.one=G\u00FCncelle updates.no.updates=T\u00FCm paketler g\u00FCncel. updates.checking=G\u00FCncellemeler kontrol ediliyor... updates.progress.running=G\u00FCncelleme i\u015Flemi devam ediyor...
# Uninstall uninstall.title=Paket Kald\u0131r uninstall.subtitle=Kurulu paketleri inceleyin ve kald\u0131r\u0131n uninstall.col.id=Paket ID uninstall.col.name=Ad uninstall.col.version=S\u00FCr\u00FCm uninstall.col.source=Kaynak uninstall.remove=Kald\u0131r uninstall.confirm.title=Kald\u0131rmay\u0131 Onayla uninstall.confirm.message="{0}" kald\u0131r\u0131ls\u0131n m\u0131? uninstall.loading=Kurulu paketler y\u00FCkleniyor... uninstall.empty=Kurulu paket bulunamad\u0131.
# Bundle bundle.title=Paket Demeti Y\u00F6neticisi bundle.subtitle=Paket demetleri olu\u015Fturun, d\u0131\u015Fa aktar\u0131n ve kurun (.ewpkg) bundle.name.placeholder=Demet ad\u0131... bundle.add=Paket Ekle bundle.remove=Kald\u0131r bundle.export=.ewpkg D\u0131\u015Fa Aktar bundle.import=.ewpkg \u0130\u00E7e Aktar bundle.install.all=Hepsini Kur bundle.col.id=Paket ID bundle.col.name=Ad bundle.col.version=S\u00FCr\u00FCm bundle.col.source=Kaynak bundle.export.success=Demet ba\u015Far\u0131yla d\u0131\u015Fa aktar\u0131ld\u0131. bundle.import.success=Demet i\u00E7e aktar\u0131ld\u0131. Paketler kuruluyor... bundle.missing.sources=Eksik kaynaklar: {0}. \u00D6nce bunlar\u0131 kurun.
# Sources sources.title=Paket Kaynaklar\u0131 sources.subtitle=Winget, Chocolatey ve Scoop kurulumlar\u0131n\u0131 y\u00F6netin sources.winget=Winget sources.choco=Chocolatey sources.scoop=Scoop sources.winget.desc=Windows Paket Y\u00F6neticisi \u2014 Windows 10/11 ile birlikte gelir. Microsoft taraf\u0131ndan geli\u015Ftirilmektedir. sources.choco.desc=En b\u00FCy\u00FCk Windows yaz\u0131l\u0131m deposu. Y\u00F6netici yetkisi gerektirir. sources.scoop.desc=Geli\u015Ftirici dostu komut sat\u0131r\u0131 kurulucusu. Kullan\u0131c\u0131 dizinine kurar. sources.winget.system=Winget bir Windows sistem bile\u015Fenidir. Microsoft Store veya App Installer \u00FCzerinden kurun. sources.winget.install.offline=Winget Kur (\u00C7evrimi\u00E7i De\u011Fil) sources.winget.install.notfound=\u00C7evrimi\u00E7i olmayan kurulum dosyas\u0131 sources/winget klas\u00F6r\u00FCnde bulunamad\u0131. sources.status.installed=\u2713 Kurulu sources.status.not.installed=Kurulu De\u011Fil sources.install=Kur sources.installing=Kuruluyor... sources.remove=Kald\u0131r sources.checking=Kontrol ediliyor... sources.install.success={0} ba\u015Far\u0131yla kuruldu. sources.install.verify.failed={0} kurulum i\u015Flemi tamamland\u0131 ancak kaynak hala kullan\u0131lam\u0131yor.
# Settings settings.title=Ayarlar settings.theme=Tema settings.theme.light=Ayd\u0131nl\u0131k settings.theme.dark=Karanl\u0131k settings.language=Dil settings.language.en=\u0130ngilizce settings.language.tr=T\u00FCrk\u00E7e settings.default.source=Varsay\u0131lan Kaynak settings.admin.warning=Y\u00FCkseltilmi\u015F i\u015Flemlerden \u00F6nce uyard\u0131 settings.admin.warning.desc=Y\u00F6netici yetkisi gerektiren i\u015Flemler \u00F6ncesi uyar\u0131 g\u00F6ster (Chocolatey, Scoop). settings.saved=Ayarlar kaydedildi.
# Admin Warning Dialog admin.warning.title=Y\u00F6netici Yetkisi Gerekli admin.warning.message=Bu i\u015Flem do\u011Fru \u00E7al\u0131\u015Fmak i\u00E7in y\u00F6netici yetkisi gerektiriyor.\n\nUygulamay\u0131 y\u00F6netici olarak yeniden ba\u015Flatmak i\u00E7in "Y\u00F6netici Olarak \u00C7al\u0131\u015Ft\u0131r" d\u00FC\u011Fmesine t\u0131klay\u0131n. admin.warning.run=Y\u00F6netici Olarak \u00C7al\u0131\u015Ft\u0131r admin.warning.cancel=\u0130ptal
# Common common.ok=Tamam common.cancel=\u0130ptal common.close=Kapat common.error=Hata common.success=Ba\u015Far\u0131l\u0131 common.warning=Uyar\u0131 common.source.all=T\u00FCm Kaynaklar common.source.all.short=t\u00FCm kaynaklarda common.log.title=\u0130\u015Flem G\u00FCnl\u00FC\u011F\u00FC common.log.empty=Hen\u00FCz bir i\u015Flem \u00E7al\u0131\u015Ft\u0131r\u0131lmad\u0131.
# Search Log search.status.source.unavailable={0} kullan\u0131lam\u0131yor. search.status.failed=Arama ba\u015Far\u0131s\u0131z: {0} search.log.search.start="{0}" i\u00E7in {1} \u00FCzerinde arama yap\u0131l\u0131yor. search.log.search.success=Arama tamamland\u0131. {0} sonu\u00E7 listelendi. search.log.search.error=Arama ba\u015Far\u0131s\u0131z: {0} search.log.install.start={0} paketi {1} \u00FCzerinden kuruluyor. search.log.install.success={0} ba\u015Far\u0131yla kuruldu. search.log.install.error=Kurulum ba\u015Far\u0131s\u0131z: {0} search.install.verify.failed=Kurulum komutu tamamland\u0131 ancak {0} hen\u00FCz kurulu listesinde do\u011Frulanamad\u0131.
# Updates Log updates.log.load.start=Mevcut kaynaklarda g\u00FCncellemeler kontrol ediliyor. updates.log.load.success=G\u00FCncelleme kontrol\u00FC tamamland\u0131. {0} g\u00FCncelleme bulundu. updates.log.load.error={0} \u00FCzerinde g\u00FCncelleme kontrol\u00FC ba\u015Far\u0131s\u0131z: {1} updates.log.update.start={0} paketi {1} \u00FCzerinden g\u00FCncelleniyor. updates.log.update.success={0} ba\u015Far\u0131yla g\u00FCncellendi. updates.log.update.all.start=Mevcut kaynaklardaki t\u00FCm paketler g\u00FCncelleniyor. updates.log.update.all.success=T\u00FCm g\u00FCncelleme komutlar\u0131 tamamland\u0131. updates.log.error=G\u00FCncelleme ba\u015Far\u0131s\u0131z: {0}
# Uninstall Log uninstall.log.load.start=Kurulu paketler y\u00FCkleniyor ({0}). uninstall.log.load.success=Kurulu paketler y\u00FCklendi. {0} \u00F6\u011Fe listelendi. uninstall.log.start={0} paketi {1} \u00FCzerinden kald\u0131r\u0131l\u0131yor. uninstall.log.success={0} ba\u015Far\u0131yla kald\u0131r\u0131ld\u0131. uninstall.log.error=Kald\u0131rma ba\u015Far\u0131s\u0131z: {0}

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# EasyWinPackages - Turkish messages app.title=EasyWinPackages
# Navigation nav.dashboard=Ana Ekran nav.search=Arama & Kurulum nav.updates=G\u00FCncellemeler nav.uninstall=Kald\u0131r nav.bundle=Paket Demeti nav.sources=Kaynaklar nav.settings=Ayarlar
# Dashboard dashboard.title=Ana Ekran dashboard.subtitle=Kurulu paketlerinize ve g\u00FCncellemelere genel bak\u0131\u015F dashboard.winget.installed=Winget Kurulu dashboard.choco.installed=Choco Kurulu dashboard.scoop.installed=Scoop Kurulu dashboard.pending.updates=Bekleyen G\u00FCncellemeler dashboard.total.installed=Toplam Kurulu dashboard.available.sources=Aktif Kaynaklar dashboard.loading=Y\u00FCkleniyor... dashboard.unavailable=Mevcut De\u011Fil dashboard.refresh=Yenile dashboard.source.winget=Windows Paket Y\u00F6neticisi dashboard.source.choco=Chocolatey dashboard.source.scoop=Scoop dashboard.updates.sub=T\u00FCm kaynaklarda dashboard.quick.actions=H\u0131zl\u0131 \u0130\u015Flemler dashboard.sources.status=Paket Y\u00F6neticisi Durumu dashboard.action.search=\uD83D\uDD0D Arama & Kurulum dashboard.action.updates=\uD83D\uDD04 G\u00FCncelleme Kontrol dashboard.action.sources=\u2699\uFE0F Kaynaklar\u0131 Y\u00F6net dashboard.install.prompt.title=Paket Y\u00F6neticisi Kur dashboard.install.prompt.msg={0} kurmak ister misiniz? dashboard.status.installed.hint=Kurulu \u2014 y\u00F6netmek i\u00E7in t\u0131klay\u0131n dashboard.status.not.installed.hint=Kurulu de\u011Fil \u2014 kurmak i\u00E7in t\u0131klay\u0131n
# Search search.title=Arama & Kurulum search.subtitle=Winget, Chocolatey veya Scoop \u00FCzerinden paket aray\u0131n ve kurun search.source=Kaynak search.source.all=T\u00FCm Kaynaklar search.source.unavailable.revert={0} kurulu de\u011Fil. \u00D6nceki se\u00E7ime geri d\u00F6n\u00FCld\u00FC. search.placeholder=Paket ad\u0131 veya ID girin... search.button=Ara search.col.id=Paket ID search.col.name=Ad search.col.version=S\u00FCr\u00FCm search.col.source=Kaynak search.col.bundle=Demet search.install=Kur search.add.bundle=+ Demete Ekle search.installing=Kuruluyor... search.no.results=Sonu\u00E7 bulunamad\u0131. Farkl\u0131 bir sorgu deneyin. search.added.bundle.title=Demete Eklendi search.added.bundle.msg={0} demete eklendi. search.source.unavailable.title=Kaynak Mevcut De\u011Fil search.source.unavailable.msg={0} bu sistemde kurulu de\u011Fil. search.source.go=Kaynaklara Git
# Updates updates.title=G\u00FCncellemeler updates.subtitle=T\u00FCm kaynaklarda g\u00FCncelleme bekleyen paketler updates.col.name=Ad updates.col.current=Mevcut updates.col.new=Mevcut G\u00FCncelleme updates.col.source=Kaynak updates.update.selected=Se\u00E7iliyi G\u00FCncelle updates.update.all=Hepsini G\u00FCncelle updates.update.one=G\u00FCncelle updates.no.updates=T\u00FCm paketler g\u00FCncel. updates.checking=G\u00FCncellemeler kontrol ediliyor... updates.progress.running=G\u00FCncelleme i\u015Flemi devam ediyor...
# Uninstall uninstall.title=Paket Kald\u0131r uninstall.subtitle=Kurulu paketleri inceleyin ve kald\u0131r\u0131n uninstall.col.id=Paket ID uninstall.col.name=Ad uninstall.col.version=S\u00FCr\u00FCm uninstall.col.source=Kaynak uninstall.remove=Kald\u0131r uninstall.confirm.title=Kald\u0131rmay\u0131 Onayla uninstall.confirm.message="{0}" kald\u0131r\u0131ls\u0131n m\u0131? uninstall.loading=Kurulu paketler y\u00FCkleniyor... uninstall.empty=Kurulu paket bulunamad\u0131.
# Bundle bundle.title=Paket Demeti Y\u00F6neticisi bundle.subtitle=Paket demetleri olu\u015Fturun, d\u0131\u015Fa aktar\u0131n ve kurun (.ewpkg) bundle.name.placeholder=Demet ad\u0131... bundle.add=Paket Ekle bundle.remove=Kald\u0131r bundle.export=.ewpkg D\u0131\u015Fa Aktar bundle.import=.ewpkg \u0130\u00E7e Aktar bundle.install.all=Hepsini Kur bundle.col.id=Paket ID bundle.col.name=Ad bundle.col.version=S\u00FCr\u00FCm bundle.col.source=Kaynak bundle.export.success=Demet ba\u015Far\u0131yla d\u0131\u015Fa aktar\u0131ld\u0131. bundle.import.success=Demet i\u00E7e aktar\u0131ld\u0131. Paketler kuruluyor... bundle.missing.sources=Eksik kaynaklar: {0}. \u00D6nce bunlar\u0131 kurun.
# Sources sources.title=Paket Kaynaklar\u0131 sources.subtitle=Winget, Chocolatey ve Scoop kurulumlar\u0131n\u0131 y\u00F6netin sources.winget=Winget sources.choco=Chocolatey sources.scoop=Scoop sources.winget.desc=Windows Paket Y\u00F6neticisi \u2014 Windows 10/11 ile birlikte gelir. Microsoft taraf\u0131ndan geli\u015Ftirilmektedir. sources.choco.desc=En b\u00FCy\u00FCk Windows yaz\u0131l\u0131m deposu. Y\u00F6netici yetkisi gerektirir. sources.scoop.desc=Geli\u015Ftirici dostu komut sat\u0131r\u0131 kurulucusu. Kullan\u0131c\u0131 dizinine kurar. sources.winget.system=Winget bir Windows sistem bile\u015Fenidir. Microsoft Store veya App Installer \u00FCzerinden kurun. sources.winget.install.offline=Winget Kur (\u00C7evrimi\u00E7i De\u011Fil) sources.winget.install.notfound=\u00C7evrimi\u00E7i olmayan kurulum dosyas\u0131 sources/winget klas\u00F6r\u00FCnde bulunamad\u0131. sources.status.installed=\u2713 Kurulu sources.status.not.installed=Kurulu De\u011Fil sources.install=Kur sources.installing=Kuruluyor... sources.remove=Kald\u0131r sources.checking=Kontrol ediliyor... sources.install.success={0} ba\u015Far\u0131yla kuruldu. sources.install.verify.failed={0} kurulum i\u015Flemi tamamland\u0131 ancak kaynak hala kullan\u0131lam\u0131yor. sources.remove.success={0} ba\u015Far\u013ıyla kald\u0131r\u0131ld\u0131. sources.remove.verify.failed={0} kald\u0131rma i\u015Flemi tamamland\u0131 ancak kaynak hala kullan\u013ılabilir g\u00F6r\u00FCn\u00FCyor.
# Settings settings.title=Ayarlar settings.theme=Tema settings.theme.system=Sistem settings.theme.light=Ayd\u0131nl\u0131k settings.theme.dark=Karanl\u0131k settings.language=Dil settings.language.en=\u0130ngilizce settings.language.tr=T\u00FCrk\u00E7e settings.default.source=Varsay\u0131lan Kaynak settings.admin.warning=Y\u00FCkseltilmi\u015F i\u015Flemlerden \u00F6nce uyard\u0131 settings.admin.warning.desc=Y\u00F6netici yetkisi gerektiren i\u015Flemler \u00F6ncesi uyar\u0131 g\u00F6ster (Chocolatey, Scoop). settings.saved=Ayarlar kaydedildi.
# Admin Warning Dialog admin.warning.title=Y\u00F6netici Yetkisi Gerekli admin.warning.message=Bu i\u015Flem do\u011Fru \u00E7al\u0131\u015Fmak i\u00E7in y\u00F6netici yetkisi gerektiriyor.\n\nUygulamay\u0131 y\u00F6netici olarak yeniden ba\u015Fatmak i\u00E7in "Y\u00F6netici Olarak \u00C7al\u0131\u015Ft\u0131r" d\u00FC\u011Fmesine t\u0131klay\u0131n. admin.warning.run=Y\u00F6netici Olarak \u00C7al\u0131\u015Ft\u0131r admin.warning.cancel=\u0130ptal
# Common common.ok=Tamam common.cancel=\u0130ptal common.close=Kapat common.error=Hata common.success=Ba\u015Far\u0131l\u0131 common.warning=Uyar\u0131 common.source.all=T\u00FCm Kaynaklar common.source.all.short=t\u00FCm kaynaklarda common.log.title=\u0130\u015Flem G\u00FCnl\u00FC\u011F\u00FC common.log.empty=Hen\u00FCz bir i\u015Flem \u00E7al\u0131\u015Ft\u0131r\u0131lmad\u0131.
# Search Log search.status.source.unavailable={0} kullan\u0131lam\u0131yor. search.status.failed=Arama ba\u015Far\u0131s\u0131z: {0} search.log.search.start="{0}" i\u00E7in {1} \u00FCzerinde arama yap\u0131l\u0131yor. search.log.search.success=Arama tamamland\u0131. {0} sonu\u00E7 listelendi. search.log.search.error=Arama ba\u015Far\u0131s\u0131z: {0} search.log.install.start={0} paketi {1} \u00FCzerinden kuruluyor. search.log.install.success={0} ba\u015Far\u013ıyla kuruldu. search.log.install.error=Kurulum ba\u015Far\u0131s\u013ız: {0} search.install.verify.failed=Kurulum komutu tamamland\u0131 ancak {0} hen\u00FCz kurulu listesinde do\u011Frulanamad\u0131.
# Updates Log updates.log.load.start=Mevcut kaynaklarda g\u00FCncellemeler kontrol ediliyor. updates.log.load.success=G\u00FCncelleme kontrol\u00FC tamamland\u0131. {0} g\u00FCncelleme bulundu. updates.log.load.error={0} \u00FCzerinde g\u00FCncelleme kontrol\u00FC ba\u015Far\u0131s\u0131z: {1} updates.log.update.start={0} paketi {1} \u00FCzerinden g\u00FCncelleniyor. updates.log.update.success={0} ba\u015Far\u013ıyla g\u00FCncellendi. updates.log.update.all.start=Mevcut kaynaklardaki t\u00FCm paketler g\u00FCncelleniyor. updates.log.update.all.success=T\u00FCm g\u00FCncelleme komutlar\u0131 tamamland\u0131. updates.log.error=G\u00FCncelleme ba\u015Far\u013ıslı: {0}
# Uninstall Log uninstall.log.load.start=Kurulu paketler y\u00FCkleniyor ({0}). uninstall.log.load.success=Kurulu paketler y\u00FCklendi. {0} \u00F6\u011Fe listelendi. uninstall.log.start={0} paketi {1} \u00FCzerinden kald\u0131r\u0131l\u0131yor. uninstall.log.success={0} ba\u015Far\u013ıyla kald\u0131r\u0131ld\u0131. uninstall.log.error=Kald\u0131rma ba\u015Far\u013ıslı: {0}
